overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city center. The player character walks along wet streets lined with towering skyscrapers, neon billboards, and scattered pedestrians with umbrellas, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking around at the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman holding black umbrella walking away from camera

entered.detail: towering building with illuminated windows rising into the fog
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
rain-soaked reflective ground with yellow tactile paving strips
bench with person sitting wearing red jacket

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a wide urban plaza during a rainy night, with wet reflective pavement and towering glass skyscrapers surrounding the area. A woman with an umbrella walks ahead while the camera tilts up to admire the massive buildings before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with pedestrian walkway and traffic

events.description: camera returns to eye level and continues walking along the sidewalk
vehicles pass by on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward camera on sidewalk

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying red graphics with white text
multi-lane road with moving vehicle traffic
tall pole with bright white floodlight illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza onto a main city street, the camera walks along a wet sidewalk beside a busy road. A massive red billboard dominates the right side while pedestrians with umbrellas pass by, and vehicles drive along the rain-slicked street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between high-rise buildings with service entrances

events.description: entering narrower street corridor with NC CLEANING sign visible
entering area with red ambient lighting on building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower street section with industrial elements and graffiti

entered.detail: illuminated sign with arrow patterns above a service entrance
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
building facade bathed in red light with dark windows

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrower, more enclosed street with industrial character. The camera passes an NC CLEANING service entrance and walls covered in graffiti, while red lighting casts an ominous glow on the building facades.

events.description: passing building entrance with teal neon lights and security bollards

agents.ego_description: walking past a building entrance with distinctive teal lighting

notable_agents.action: man with beard and cybernetic arm walking past camera

entered.detail: building entrance with glowing teal neon lights and security bollards
exposed ventilation pipes running along building exterior

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark industrial corridor, the camera passes a striking building entrance illuminated by teal neon lights. The WNSA NEWS billboard becomes visible in the distance as the street begins to open up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway area with overhead shelter

agents.ego_description: walking under a covered walkway with reflective wet surfaces

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress walking toward camera under the covered area

entered.detail: overhead structure providing shelter with reflective ceiling
bright yellow illuminated signage in the distance
tall palm tree trunk visible on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under a covered pedestrian walkway, sheltering from the rain. Yellow neon signs glow in the distance while the wet pavement continues to reflect the city's vibrant lights, and a palm tree stands on the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-soaked urban plaza into the claustrophobic industrial corridors of a neon-lit city. It begins in an open square surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, where the camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the architecture before following a woman with an umbrella forward. As the camera moves onto a main city street, the vista expands to include a massive red billboard and the flow of vehicles on rain-slicked roads, before shifting into a narrower, more enclosed street characterized by graffiti-covered walls and an ominous red glow. The path then leads through a dark industrial corridor illuminated by teal neon lights, passing a WNSA NEWS billboard as the environment begins to open up once more. Finally, the camera moves under a covered pedestrian walkway, sheltering from the rain beside a lone palm tree while yellow neon signs glow in the distance.
